title: Pay Classes
description: The standard method of paying employees.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the pay class.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of the pay class.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of the pay class.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that may be used to identify the pay class.

paysPerYear.title: Pays Per Year
paysPerYear.description: The number of pays per year employees are scheduled to receive.

classType.title: Class Type
classType.description: An indicator if the pay class is supplemental to (used in addition to) another pay class.

payCycle.title: Pay Cycle
payCycle.description: The cycle which determines how employees are paid for the given pay class.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Pay Cycle.

payFrequency.title: Pay Frequency
payFrequency.description: The frequency at which employees are paid when they are working.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Pay Frequency.

hoursPerPeriod.title: Hours Per Period
hoursPerPeriod.description: The default pay period work hours for positions associated with the pay class.

period.title: Period
period.description: The default time period (e.g. day, week, month, etc.).

hours.title: Hours
hours.description: The default work hours in the specified time period.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of the pay class (e.g. active or inactive).

compensationType.title: Compensation Type
compensationType.description: The compensation type associated with the pay class (e.g. salary or wages).
